mapper.select: SELECT g.*, c.name AS categoryName FROM goods AS g INNER JOIN category AS c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.id ASC, g.create_date_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM goods WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT g.*, c.name AS categoryName FROM goods AS g INNER JOIN category AS c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.id = #{id} AND g.is_deleted = 0
